Description.en: 40% reduced Life, Mana, and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] Recovery Rate
Description.zh: 生命、魔力、[EnergyShield|能量护盾]回复速度降低 40%

Description.en: 75% reduced Life, Mana, and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] Recovery Rate
Description.zh: 生命、魔力、[EnergyShield|能量护盾]回复速度降低 75%

Description.en: 50% less Area of Effect and [Projectile] Speed
Description.zh: 效果区域和[Projectile|投射物]速度总降 50%

Description.en: [Buff|Buffs] expire three times faster and [Debuff|Debuffs] expire three times slower
Description.zh: [Buff|增益状态]的消减速度加快三倍，[Debuff|减益状态]的消减速度减慢三倍

Description.en: 40% less [Armour], [Evasion] and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]
Description.zh: [Armour|护甲], [Evasion|闪避]和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]总降 40%

Description.en: 75% less [Armour], [Evasion] and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]
Description.zh: [Armour|护甲], [Evasion|闪避]和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]总降 75%

Description.en: -15% to Elemental [Resistances] and -10% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Elemental Resistances]
Description.zh: -15% 元素[Resistances|抗性]，- 10% [MaximumResistances|元素抗性上限]

Description.en: -30% to Elemental [Resistances] and -20% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Elemental Resistances]
Description.zh: -30% 元素[Resistances|抗性]，- 20% [MaximumResistances|元素抗性上限]

Description.en: Monsters grant no [Flask] and [Charm] Charges on death
Description.zh: 怪物被击败时不提供[Flask|药剂]和[Charm|咒符]充能

Description.en: In each encounter room, damage taken will slowly increase by 1% per second, up to 50%
Description.zh: 在每一个遭遇战房间中，受到的伤害每秒提高 1%，最多 50%

Description.en: Monsters gain 20% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed]
Description.zh: 怪物的[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提高 20%

Description.en: Monsters [Gain|gain] 20% of damage added as extra [Chaos] damage
Description.zh: 怪物[Gain|获得]相当于 20% 伤害的额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害

Description.en: Monsters [Gain|gain] 50% of damage added as extra [Chaos] damage
Description.zh: 怪物[Gain|获得]相当于 50% 伤害的额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害

Description.en: Monsters have 300% increased [Critical] Hit Chance
Description.zh: 怪物的[Critical|暴击]几率提高 300%

Description.en: Monsters always deal [Critical] Hits
Description.zh: 怪物必定[Critical|暴击]

Description.en: Monster [HitDamage|Hits] always inflict [Bleeding] and [Poison]
Description.zh: 怪物的[HitDamage|击中]必定造成[Bleeding|流血]和[Poison|中毒]

Description.en: Monsters have +40% to all [Resistances]
Description.zh: 怪物的所有[Resistances|抗性] +40%

Description.en: Monsters cannot be [Slow|Slowed] or [Stun|Stunned]
Description.zh: 怪物无法被[Slow|减速]或[Stun|晕眩]

Description.en: Monsters are protected by [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]
Description.zh: 怪物受到[EnergyShield|能量护盾]保护

Description.en: Monsters inflict [GraspingVines|Grasping Vines] on [HitDamage|Hit]
Description.zh: 怪物[HitDamage|击中]时施加[GraspingVines|缓速藤蔓]

Description.en: Bosses deal more damage and take less damage
Description.zh: 首领造成的伤害提高，受到的伤害降低

Description.en:
[Rarity|Rare] Monsters have an additional [MonsterModifiers|Modifier]
30% increased Rare Monsters
Description.zh:
[Rarity|稀有]怪物额外具有一个[MonsterModifiers|词缀]
稀有怪物数量提高 30%

Description.en:
Your [Projectile|Projectiles] fly in random directions
Monsters fire additional [Projectile|Projectiles]
Description.zh:
你的[Projectile|投射物]朝随机方向飞行
怪物发射额外[Projectile|投射物]

Description.en: You and your [Minion|Minions] deal no damage for 2 seconds every 8 seconds
Description.zh: 每隔 8 秒，你和你的[Minion|召唤生物]就有 2 秒不能造成伤害

Description.en: Monsters release deadly [Volatiles] on death. [Rarity|Rare] monsters leave larger ones
Description.zh: 怪物被击败时释放致命的[Volatiles|无常]。[Rarity|稀有]怪物产生的无常范围更大

Description.en: Bloody hearts appear that apply tethers, [Slow|Slowing] you. Breaking the tether will [Stun] you
Description.zh: 出现赤红核心并产生缚索，使你[Slow|减速]。打破缚索会使你[Stun|晕眩]

Description.en: Bloody hearts appear that apply tethers, [Slow|Slowing] you. Breaking the tether will [Stun] you and cause you to become vulnerable to damage for a duration
Description.zh: 出现赤红核心并产生缚索，使你[Slow|减速]。打破缚索会使你[Stun|晕眩]，并且在短时间内更容易受到伤害

Description.en: Runes will appear that will call deadly [Lightning] storms if you remain in them
Description.zh: 出现一片符纹，你站在其中会遭到它唤来的[Lightning|闪电]风暴袭击

Description.en: Large runes will appear that will call deadly [Lightning] storms if you remain in them
Description.zh: 出现一大片符纹，你站在其中会遭到它唤来的[Lightning|闪电]风暴袭击

Description.en: Many large runes will appear that will call deadly [Lightning] storms if you remain in them
Description.zh: 出现大量符纹，你站在其中会遭到它唤来的[Lightning|闪电]风暴袭击

Description.en: Rings of Doom appear on the ground which grow over time, exploding for [Physical] damage once they reach a maximum area
Description.zh: 地面上会出现末日之环，并且不断扩大，达到最大范围时爆炸，造成[Physical|物理]伤害

Description.en: Rings and circles of Doom appear on the ground which grow over time, exploding for [Physical] damage once they reach a maximum area
Description.zh: 地面上会出现末日之环与末日之圈，并且不断扩大，达到最大范围时爆炸，造成[Physical|物理]伤害

Description.en: Globules of blood manifest nearby, tracking you. When above you they will fall, dealing [Physical] damage
Description.zh: 赤红之球在附近凝结并追踪你，到达你上方时将会落下，造成[Physical|物理]伤害

Description.en: Globules of blood manifest nearby, tracking you. When above you they will fall, dealing [Physical] damage and creating damaging blood ground
Description.zh: 赤红之球在附近凝结并追踪你，到达你上方时将会落下，造成[Physical|物理]伤害，并产生伤害性的地面效果

Description.en: An ancient Vaal machination will deploy attacks against nearby intruders
Description.zh: 一台古老的瓦尔机械体将对附近的入侵者发起攻击

Description.en: An ancient Vaal machination will deploy an array of attacks against nearby intruders
Description.zh: 一台古老的瓦尔机械体将对附近的入侵者发起一连串攻击

Description.en: An ancient Vaal machination will deploy a powerful array of attacks against nearby intruders
Description.zh: 一台古老的瓦尔机械体将对附近的入侵者发起一连串强力攻击

Description.en: Pyramid objects appear, projecting four rotating lasers that inflict [CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] on Hit
Description.zh: 出现金字塔状的物体，射出四道不断旋转的激光，击中时施加[CorruptedBlood|腐化之血]

Description.en: Pyramid objects appear, projecting four fast rotating lasers that inflict [CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] on Hit
Description.zh: 出现金字塔状的物体，射出四道不断快速旋转的激光，击中时施加[CorruptedBlood|腐化之血]

Description.en: Challenge area contains several statues that [Petrify] you if you stand within their gaze for a duration
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有多个雕像，在雕像的凝视范围内停留一段时间，就会令你陷入[Petrify|石化]

Description.en: Challenge area contains several statues that [Petrify] you for a long duration if you stand within their gaze for a short duration
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有多个雕像，在雕像的凝视范围内停留一小段时间，就会令你陷入长时间的[Petrify|石化]

Description.en: Challenge area is enshrouded by a blood mist which makes monsters within it immune to damage
Description.zh: 挑战区域笼罩在浓雾之中，使其中的怪物免疫伤害

Description.en:
An invulnerable shade stalks you, inflicting Ruin with its [Melee] hits
Fail the Trials on reaching 7 Ruin
Description.zh:
一个无敌的阴影尾随你，用[Melee|近战]击中给你施加摧灭效果
积累 7 层摧灭后试炼失败

Description.en:
An invulnerable shade stalks you, gaining speed and inflicting Ruin with [Melee] and [Projectile] hits
Fail the Trials on reaching 7 Ruin
Description.zh:
一个无敌的阴影快速尾随你，用[Melee|近战]和[Projectile|投射物]击中给你施加摧灭效果
积累 7 层摧灭后试炼失败

Description.en:
An invulnerable shade stalks you, gaining further speed and inflicting Ruin with powerful [Melee] and [Projectile] hits
Fail the Trials on reaching 7 Ruin
Description.zh:
一个无敌的阴影以更快的速度尾随你，用强力[Melee|近战]和[Projectile|投射物]击中给你施加摧灭效果
积累 7 层摧灭后试炼失败

Description.en: Challenge area contains turrets that will periodically fire [Fire] [Projectile|Projectiles] ahead
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有炮台，会周期性地向前方发射[Fire|火焰][Projectile|投射物]

Description.en: Challenge area contains turrets that will periodically fire barrages of [Fire] [Projectile|Projectiles] ahead
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有炮台，会周期性地向前方发射一串[Fire|火焰][Projectile|投射物]

Description.en: Challenge area contains turrets that will periodically fire [Lightning] [Projectile|Projectiles] ahead
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有炮台，会周期性地向前方发射[Lightning|闪电][Projectile|投射物]

Description.en: Challenge area contains turrets that will periodically fire a wave of [Lightning] [Projectile|Projectiles] ahead
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有炮台，会周期性地向前方发射一波[Lightning|闪电][Projectile|投射物]

Description.en: Challenge area contains spikes that deal [Physical] damage to those who step on them
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有尖刺，对踏上尖刺的目标造成[Physical|物理]伤害

Description.en: Challenge area contains many spikes that deal [Physical] damage to those who step on them
Description.zh: 挑战区域含有许多尖刺，对踏上尖刺的目标造成[Physical|物理]伤害
